creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Hello again, Palle!

I am terribly sorry, but those port-numbers did confuse me (8.3.15_3
according to www.freshports.org, but 8.4.8_3 according to compilation
for the older version as well as for the new version!), and I did not
notice, that cvsup.at.FreeBSD.org had not updated this port yet.
Used tarball from freshports now (as cvsup.FreeBSD.org has timeout since
at least two days here), all OK.

Sorry once again!

Regards,
 Kalten
